title: Integrate Facial Rust app capabilities into native Handshake Ingest
operator_request: The Rust facial.exe app is used a lot and should be rebuilt as Handshake native tools for image mining and LoRA training ingest.

lifecycle.ready_for_validation_reason: Product commit adf132ec hardens MT-019 with a tracked native Facial registry/run module, persisted actor-stable native_run analysis projection, actor-attributed receipt/API run metadata, strict frontend parser schema checks, Atelier Argus artifact refs, and internal UserManual coverage with focused backend/frontend proof commands passing.

state_recovery.recovery_rule: Inspect the external Facial source/spec before implementation. Port capabilities into Handshake-native modules; do not shell out to facial.exe as the default product path unless explicitly accepted as a transitional adapter.

scope.summary: Bring Facial's Rust image-quality, identity, dedupe, review, and dataset-prep capabilities into Handshake native Ingest.
base_scope: Research/inspect Facial product source and app spec.
Map Facial capabilities to Handshake Ingest primitives and receipts.
Implement native quality, identity, dedupe, and review assistance as reusable Handshake tools.
Expose headless commands/receipts for model agents and visible Ingest controls for operators.
Link Facial-derived results to CKC character/image review state.
Update internal UserManual with Facial-backed Ingest tools.
acceptance_criteria: Facial capability map exists from source/spec to Handshake native functions.
At least one high-value Facial capability is implemented natively in Ingest.
Results are attributable, persisted, and linkable to CKC/Ingest review sets.
Argus can inspect and steer the Facial-backed Ingest surface.
verification: Capability-map review against external Facial source/spec.
Native backend tests for implemented capability.
Native UI/Argus evidence for operator/model workflow.

handoff.implementation_summary: Added and tracked the Handshake-native Facial registry/run module, wired Facial ingest summaries to native_run metadata, preserved actor-stable persisted analysis hashes by omitting requested_by/run_id from analysis_json while keeping actor-attributed run metadata in API/receipt surfaces, hardened the frontend parser, removed a dead placeholder plugin constant, and updated the internal manual/Atelier panel test fixtures.
handoff.validation_summary: Focused backend probe passed 12 tests against product Facial modules after final commit adf132ec. Frontend parser, request-builder, Atelier panel, and manual tests passed with CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 and shared Handshake_Artifacts target. Cross-target mt019_facial_probe cargo check passed for x86_64-unknown-linux-musl with CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0. Cached diff whitespace check passed. Product branch feat/WP-CKC-posekit-overhaul pushed through adf132ec.
validation_blockers: Full handshake_core cargo proof remains a validator follow-up: earlier attempts hit external rustc 0xffffffff/process pressure, and this session also hit artifact disk pressure until frontend proofs were rerun with CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0. The operator separately instructed this session to skip the other active heavy Rust run.
